replies.msg:
今年4月頭左右同悠二買左部電腦
原因係我本身想要
Kingston HyperX Predator RGB (2 x 8GB) DDR4 3200MHz C16

但悠二話唔抵用
叫我轉 ADATA XPG SPECTRIX D60G (2 X 8GB) DDR4 3200MHZ C16 RGB — TITANIUM

但我唔想用adata RAM
所以我叫佢推薦另一條RAM俾我
佢就推我用下面呢條RAM
GALAX HOF OC Lab Arduino 16GB (2 x 8GB) DDR4 4000MHz CL19 Samsung B-DIE

咁最後我發現原來 Gigabyte B450M AORUS ELITE Micro-ATX 係最多只可以上到3600MHz

依家用係bios搞 XMP 上4000MHz
唔夠一陣就黑mon重開就reset埋bios
有冇邊條RAM可以穩定行XMP 3200/3600MHz

依家部電腦個list就係咁既
1 x AMD Ryzen™ 7 3700X
1 x Gigabyte B450M AORUS ELITE Micro-ATX
1 x GALAX HOF OC Lab Arduino 16GB (2 x 8GB) DDR4 4000MHz CL19 Samsung B-DIE
1 x Toshiba DT01ACA100 1TB 7200rpm 3.5
1 x [砌機優惠]Kingston A2000 1TB PCIe Gen3x4 M.2 2280
1 x Gigabyte GeForce® RTX 2070 SUPER™ GAMING OC 3X WHITE 8GB GDDR6
1 x [砌機優惠]Antec High Current Pro Series HCP-850-PLATINUM 850W Fully-Modular
1 x SilverStone FARA B1 RGB Tempered Glass ATX
1 x Noctua NH-U12A 120mm Premium CPU Cooler with Two High-Performance Quiet NF-A12x25 PWM Fans

喺佢到買機千祈唔好聽佢講就得
佢嗰啲砌機優惠成Q日推ADATA同技奸
唔知咩心態

你set 4000有問題
你自己set 返3600 咪得囉
